title: Canada Workers Benefit Statistics – 2021 Tax Year - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Workers Benefit Statistics – 2021 Tax Year
This publication provides statistics based on information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all recipients of the Canada workers benefit (CWB) for the 2021 tax year. The CWB replaces and strengthens the working income tax benefit (WITB). It is an enhanced and more accessible refundable tax credit.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
